creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Please cancel this bug report. The problem was with my setup.

-- Martin


n.b. In my setup, I have patched the science/libkml port to generate a libkmlminizip instead of a libminizip, because the latter conflicts with archivers/minizip. With the March 6 update to graphics/gdal, I did not properly merge the associated patch for gdal so that it did not find libkml any more.
